description_long: This is a porcelain teacup with a matching saucer, both adorned with a delicate floral pattern featuring pink roses and green leaves. The cup has a gently flared rim and a pale yellow, ornate handle with a subtle curl, adding an elegant touch. The saucer mirrors the cup's floral motif and has a slightly raised edge to help contain spills. The interior of the cup is plain white, contrasting with the richly decorated exterior. The overall finish is glossy, giving the set a refined and polished appearance. This set is reminiscent of fine English china, suitable for tea service in a garden or urban café setting.
description: A porcelain teacup and saucer set with a pink rose floral pattern and a pale yellow ornate handle, finished in a glossy glaze.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate pale yellow handle on the right and the full floral pattern on both cup and saucer.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle directly at the back, highlighting the continuous floral design and the symmetry of the saucer.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left, emphasizing the handle's decorative curl and the seamless floral motif.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle hidden, focusing on the uninterrupted floral pattern and the cup's smooth curvature.
